packages.description: Loads and tracks assets through Addressables, managing AssetHandle lifetimes and reference counts.
Loads component configs and creates BaseComponent instances by type key.
Publishes synchronous and asynchronous typed events with subscription handles.
Organizes 2D object and canvas roots into ordered runtime layer nodes.
Registers message handlers and dispatches synchronous or asynchronous message calls.
Pools prefab instances and coordinates component lifecycle dispatch.
Loads sprites through Asset Manager and tracks SpriteHandle lifetimes.
Builds and runs frame-driven task chains with actions, waits, loops and lifetimes.
